title: agrostis alba var. clementei
intro: Agrostis alba var. clementei, also known as White Bent, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of the Iberian Peninsula in Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Agrostis alba var. clementei include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a herbal smoke to help relieve respiratory issues.
